Name: search_news_aggregate
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('search_news_aggregate', (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news"("search" := $3) AS "_fn_search_news" LIMIT 5) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."content" AS "content") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "search_news_aggregate")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
